title: [cross-impl] trickle reset() guard inconsistency
description: Python reset: if generation==0 or interval != imin (trickle.py:96); Rust: state==Stopped or interval!=imin (trickle.rs:181); C: transmit_time==0 or interval!=imin (trickle.c:124). Different edge cases (init, after reset). C comment says ported from Rust but logic diverged. Affects when reset shrinks interval vs no-op. See reset methods in all three impls. Commit 3d2c7ed3c touched these but did not align.
